notify-osc-auto.description: Desktop notification on agent_end via OSC escape sequences. Auto-detects terminal: Kitty (KITTY_WINDOW_ID) -> OSC 99, iTerm2 (TERM_PROGRAM=iTerm.app or ITERM_SESSION_ID) -> OSC 9, otherwise -> OSC 777 (Ghostty, WezTerm, rxvt-unicode). tmux-aware (wraps in DCS passthrough). Writes to /dev/tty since pi-assert discards assert stdout; set PI_NOTIFY_OUT to redirect. Always exits 0 (never blocks). Enable only one notify-osc-* assert.
notify-osc-auto.shell: ESC=$(printf '\033'); BEL=$(printf '\007'); ST=$(printf '\033\\'); if [ -n "$KITTY_WINDOW_ID" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}]99;i=1:d=0;Pi${ST}${ESC}]99;i=1:p=body;Ready for input${ST}"; elif [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "iTerm.app" ] || [ -n "$ITERM_SESSION_ID" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}]9;Pi: Ready for input${BEL}"; else SEQ="${ESC}]777;notify;Pi;Ready for input${BEL}"; fi; if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}Ptmux;$(printf '%s' "$SEQ" | sed "s/${ESC}/${ESC}${ESC}/g")${ST}"; fi; printf '%s' "$SEQ" >"${PI_NOTIFY_OUT:-/dev/tty}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

notify-osc-777.description: OSC 777 desktop notification (Ghostty, WezTerm, rxvt-unicode) on agent_end. tmux-aware (DCS passthrough). Writes to /dev/tty since pi-assert discards stdout; set PI_NOTIFY_OUT to redirect. Always exits 0. Use when notify-osc-auto misdetects your terminal. Enable only one notify-osc-* assert.
notify-osc-777.shell: ESC=$(printf '\033'); BEL=$(printf '\007'); ST=$(printf '\033\\'); SEQ="${ESC}]777;notify;Pi;Ready for input${BEL}"; if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}Ptmux;$(printf '%s' "$SEQ" | sed "s/${ESC}/${ESC}${ESC}/g")${ST}"; fi; printf '%s' "$SEQ" >"${PI_NOTIFY_OUT:-/dev/tty}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

notify-osc-9.description: OSC 9 notification (iTerm2) on agent_end. tmux-aware (DCS passthrough). Writes to /dev/tty since pi-assert discards stdout; set PI_NOTIFY_OUT to redirect. Always exits 0. Use when notify-osc-auto misdetects your terminal. Enable only one notify-osc-* assert.
notify-osc-9.shell: ESC=$(printf '\033'); BEL=$(printf '\007'); ST=$(printf '\033\\'); SEQ="${ESC}]9;Pi: Ready for input${BEL}"; if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}Ptmux;$(printf '%s' "$SEQ" | sed "s/${ESC}/${ESC}${ESC}/g")${ST}"; fi; printf '%s' "$SEQ" >"${PI_NOTIFY_OUT:-/dev/tty}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

notify-osc-99.description: OSC 99 notification (Kitty) on agent_end: title part (i=1:d=0) then body (i=1:p=body). tmux-aware (DCS passthrough). Writes to /dev/tty since pi-assert discards stdout; set PI_NOTIFY_OUT to redirect. Always exits 0. Use when notify-osc-auto misdetects your terminal. Enable only one notify-osc-* assert.
notify-osc-99.shell: ESC=$(printf '\033'); BEL=$(printf '\007'); ST=$(printf '\033\\'); SEQ="${ESC}]99;i=1:d=0;Pi${ST}${ESC}]99;i=1:p=body;Ready for input${ST}"; if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then SEQ="${ESC}Ptmux;$(printf '%s' "$SEQ" | sed "s/${ESC}/${ESC}${ESC}/g")${ST}"; fi; printf '%s' "$SEQ" >"${PI_NOTIFY_OUT:-/dev/tty}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
